analysis:
To compare the weather in 2025 and 2024, let's look at the historical data for March 14th of both years.

In 2024, on March 14th, the maximum temperature was 33.5°C and the minimum temperature was 24.8°C, with a maximum wind speed of 22.0 km/h.

In 2025, on March 14th, the maximum temperature was 33.4°C and the minimum temperature was 24.7°C, with a maximum wind speed of 16.2 km/h.

The difference between the two years is:
- Maximum temperature: 2024 (33.5°C) was 0.1°C higher than 2025 (33.4°C)
- Minimum temperature: 2024 (24.8°C) was 0.1°C higher than 2025 (24.7°C)
- Maximum wind speed: 2024 (22.0 km/h) was 5.8 km/h higher than 2025 (16.2 km/h)

Note that the data is only available for March 14th of both years, so this comparison is limited to that specific date.

query: what is the trend from 2022 to 2026
analysis:
The trend from 2022 to 2026 in Chennai, India, shows variations in temperature and precipitation. 
On March 14th of each year, the maximum temperatures were: 32.5°C in 2022, 31.2°C in 2023, 33.5°C in 2024, 33.4°C in 2025, and a forecasted 33.4°C in 2026.
The highest maximum temperature was 33.5°C in 2024, and the lowest was 31.2°C in 2023.
The minimum temperatures on the same dates were: 22.1°C in 2022, 23.4°C in 2023, 24.8°C in 2024, 24.7°C in 2025, and a forecasted 24.1°C in 2026.
There was no precipitation on March 14th in the years 2022, 2023, 2024, and 2025, but the forecast for 2026 shows no precipitation on the 14th as well.
